docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TASLIMI, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT INTELENYX SYSTEMS, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TASLIMI, ALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTELENYX SYSTEMS, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $153,066.58 PRINCIPAL, $1,628.49 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $155,130.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
